title: Oven Overtemperature
shortDescription: The oven cavity temperature has exceeded the safe maximum.
fullDescription: Safety shutdown due to excessive temperature. Check cooling fan, thermostat, and temperature sensor.

causes.cause: Primary component for oven overtemperature has failed

symptoms: Oven does not heat or heats incorrectly

fixSteps.title: Power reset
fixSteps.instruction: Turn off at breaker for 10 minutes.

fixSteps.title: Check the component
fixSteps.instruction: Inspect the component indicated by the error.

fixSteps.title: Test electrically
fixSteps.instruction: Use a multimeter to verify component values.

fixSteps.title: Replace if faulty
fixSteps.instruction: Swap the faulty part and test.

whenToCallPro: Oven repairs involving heating elements, control boards, or safety systems should be handled by a qualified technician.

faq.q: What does Neff oven error E005 mean?
faq.a: The oven cavity temperature has exceeded the safe maximum.

faq.q: Are Neff oven codes similar to Bosch?
faq.a: Yes. Neff and Bosch ovens share BSH electronics and often use similar error codes.

faq.q: Is E005 serious?
faq.a: Most oven errors require attention before continued use. Safety-related errors like overtemperature should be resolved immediately.

title: Temperature Sensor Short
shortDescription: The oven temperature sensor has a short circuit.
fullDescription: The NTC sensor reads near-zero resistance, preventing temperature control.

causes.cause: Primary component for temperature sensor short has failed

symptoms: Oven does not heat or heats incorrectly

fixSteps.title: Power reset
fixSteps.instruction: Turn off at breaker for 10 minutes.

fixSteps.title: Check the component

fixSteps.title: Replace if faulty

whenToCallPro: Oven repairs involving heating elements, control boards, or safety systems should be handled by a qualified technician.

faq.a: Most oven errors require attention before continued use. Safety-related errors like overtemperature should be resolved immediately.
